fault_type: client_error client_error_ratio error error_ratio request response
symptom_vector: Pod crash, pod terminated unexpectedly, container exit, pod failure

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [emailservice] experienced [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio, request, response] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [emailservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)

Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [Connection, refused] in Log (From GT key_observations) - Actual evidence: 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp 10.233.49.244:5000: connect: connection refused'

Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [Error, while, dialing] in Log (From GT key_observations) - Actual evidence: 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp 10.233.49.244:5000: connect: connection refused'
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in Log (From GT key_observations) - Actual evidence: 'rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = connection error'
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_cpu_usage] in Metric (From GT key_observations) - Actual evidence: 'pod_cpu_usage' appears in available_metric_names and anomaly_metrics
Step 6: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio, request, response] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 'connection refused' error appeared in checkoutservice logs targeting emailservice port 5000
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'connection refused' in logs during fault timeframe, specifically looking for references to emailservice

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 'Error while dialing' error message appeared in RPC connection failures
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'Error while dialing' in logs to identify connection establishment failures

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 'Unavailable' status code appeared in RPC error responses
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'Unavailable' in logs to identify service availability issues

critical_checks.expected_pattern: pod_cpu_usage metric showed abnormal patterns for redis-cart-0 with 200% p99 change ratio
critical_checks.instruction: Check pod_cpu_usage metrics for all pods during fault timeframe, looking for significant deviations
